title: La Notte del Compleanno (The Night of the Birthday)
overview: The Arcana Famigila protects Regalo Island with powers granted to them the Tarocco. At birthday party for the head of the family, “Papa” Mondo, he tells them he is thinking about retirement and the Arcana Duello will begin.

title: Il Comandante della Squadra Protezione Animali (Commander of the Animal Protection Team)
overview: Felicitá remembers the joy of her first day joining the family. But those memories are pushed aside when her thoughts turn back to the upcoming Arcana Duello.

title: Piccolino (Little One)
overview: Piccolino is the annual children event held by the Family, Pace, Debito, and Luca discuss growing up together.

title: Confessioni di una Maschera (Confession of A Mask)
overview: Libertá memories of his child hood start to come back after trying to put out a fire. Which leads to a confrontation with his mentor Dante.

title: Amici d'Infanzia (Childhood Friends)
overview: Libertá is not the only one dealing with memories of the past. Nova who has been a part of the family since childhood, has never fully felt comfortable.

title: La Bordo! La Battaglia Finale (All Aboard! The Final Battle)
overview: Pirates have landed in Regalo Island and have kidnapped Nova’s father, Moreno. The family is told to wait but Nova, Liberta, and Felicita move to rescue Moreno without permission.

title: Rispettivi Segreti (Their Secrets)
overview: Felicitá has gone missing and none of the house staff can find her. Libertá and Nova have been tasked by Mama to find her and deliver a letter.

title: La Luna nel Buio (The Moonlight in the Darkness)
overview: Debito, Luca, and Pace have been friends since childhood and they all share a hatred for Jolly.

title: La Ruota della Fortuna (The Wheel of Fortune)
overview: Felicitá has insisted on learning the truth behind Elmo. When she finally does, the answer is bigger than expected. The truth involves the entire family and their contracts with the Tarocco.

title: Arcana Famiglia (Arcane Family)
overview: With the use of her 2nd arcana power, Felicitá has lost memories. The family is distraught and the one who caused this mess might be the only person to fix it.

title: Arcano Triangolo (Mysterious Triangle)
overview: Felicitá bravery in using her powers has sparked other members of the family to come to term with their Arcana powers and prepare for the duel.

title: Arcano Duello (Arcane Duel)
overview: The Arcana duello and to save Papa she must be a pick a lover. The duello will unleash everybody power and desire.
